name: Numbing Ride
outcome: While [AttackerName] rides [TargetName]'s rigid length, she lets her incredibly long tongue expertly lick up and down [TargetHisOrHer] chest and stomach, occasionally rolling her tongue in a teasing circle as she coats [TargetName] in her paralytic saliva.
miss: While [AttackerName] rides [TargetName]'s rigid length, she lets her incredibly long tongue expertly lick up and down [TargetHisOrHer] chest and stomach, but [TargetYouOrMonsterName] resists the pleasure!
statusOutcome: [TargetName] body starts to feel increasingly numb and unresponsive as [AttackerName]'s paralytic venom seeps into [TargetHisOrHer] skin...
